Dear Carey,

❤️Happy 20th Sizzy✨❤️ Thank you for being my safe place, my biggest supporter, and one of the greatest blessings in my life. Cheers to a beautiful new chapter filled with love, laughter, and everything you've been praying for. I love you always.❤️🌸🌸🌸

Thank you for being family in every way that matters. May your twenties bring you peace, purpose, joy, and countless reasons to smile. You deserve the very best. ✨

Love you— always, Joy
